steps.title: Find the contrast target
steps.content: The student wants to contrast first-class and second-class levers. The relevant notes distinguish the two by which part sits between the effort and the other part.

steps.title: Compare the choices
steps.content: Choice A contrasts effort and load, not lever classes; Choice B is too vague; Choice C stresses a shared feature. Choice D states the specific difference in part placement for each class. The answer is D.
